title: Splashy
description: Allows greater control over the splash text on the main menu.
body:
This mod gives you more control over the splash text that is displayed on the main menu. For example you can disable the vanilla splash texts, or add new splash text entries.

Current Features

  • Ability to disable all vanilla splash texts. (Enabled by default)
  • The names of installed mods are added to the splash pool. (Enabled by default)
  • List of custom splash texts to add to the pool. (Contains several examples by default. Can be cleared.)
